description:
Stage-2 (Qualification) entry handler. When an applicant is moved into
Stage 2, emails them a per-applicant token URL for the Application
Information Confirmation survey configured on their job.

Dedup is scoped to the CURRENT applicant, not to email globally:
user_inputs with (this email, this survey, create_date >= applicant
create_date) count as "already dispatched for this application".
Anything older came from a prior application of the same person and
doesn't block sending a fresh info survey for THIS application. (The
assessment dedup in changeset 008 intentionally keeps prior
completions — assessments are once-per-candidate, the info survey is
once-per-application.)

Also ships the recruiter "Resend Info Survey" button on the hr.applicant
Action menu (form + list).

The hr.job.x_studio_application_information custom field already exists
on every target env (created via Studio on prod, cloned on dev /
staging) so no create_field is needed.

model_id=662 is hr.applicant's ir.model id (verified consistent across
dev / staging / prod).
